message:
Hey there,

I've got a burning question about getting a tattoo and would love to get some insights from your awesome team. Do tattoos hurt more than the existential dread of knowing we're all just fleeting shadows in a vast, indifferent universe?

Looking forward to your reply before my soul turns to dust.

Cheers!
